name: Pineapple, Mango and Cucumber Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pineapple, diced into small pieces
3 tbsp Green onion or chives, finely chopped
Hawaiian chili pepper or Jalapeno, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all ingredients into small diced pieces.
2. Mix well and adjust seasoning as desired.
3. Chill the salsa to allow flavors to marinate and marry together.
4. This salsa pairs well with white fish.
